field_notes.transaction_id: Smallest VarInt transaction id fixture accepted by ClientboundCustomQueryPacket(int, CustomQueryPayload) without initialized Minecraft state.
field_notes.payload_id: Smallest one-character namespace and path Identifier fixture accepted by Identifier.parse(String) without initialized Minecraft state; DiscardedQueryPayload writes an empty payload body.

stop_boundary: Proves Login clientbound custom_query packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official transactionId=0, payloadId=a:a, empty DiscardedQueryPayload fixture only; do not infer plugin channel handling, custom query semantics, login acknowledgement behavior, Login-to-Configuration state transition handling, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
